title: mine-wait expect message says '5 minutes' but timeout is 10 minutes
description:
In e2e_testnet.rs line 470, the .expect() message reads "tx must be mined within 5 minutes" but MINE_WAIT_SECS = 600 (10 minutes). When this timeout fires, the panic message will claim only 5 minutes elapsed, misleading anyone debugging a real mine-wait timeout. The string is a stale copy-paste from when the budget was presumably 300 s.

Fix: change the message to "tx must be mined within 10 minutes (MINE_WAIT_SECS)" or derive it from the constant.
close_reason: Duplicate of nie-y9n3.2 (same stale expect message defect)
